_comment: Optimization-suggestion templates (Vietnamese), used to render the '💡 Gợi ý Optimize' section. functionRules: ordered list — match the source-cased function name case-insensitively against `pattern` (Python regex), FIRST match wins; fall back to `functionDefault`. serviceBullets: keyed by the friendly service bucket. These are heuristics — adjust freely.

functionRules.text: Verify HMAC signature · Respond 200 → async Pub/Sub · Dedup bằng idempotency key
Batch nhiều ảnh/req · Cloud Tasks queue · Cache ảnh đã xử lý
Cache kết quả 24h · Queue + rate limit · Dùng LH/PageSpeed API thay tự chạy
Check frequency · Merge jobs nhỏ · Cloud Scheduler + Pub/Sub
Tăng session TTL · Cache token validation · Giảm memory alloc
Idempotency key · Circuit breaker · Check memory alloc vs p95
Cache response · Connection pooling · Timeout hợp lý

functionDefault: Review memory alloc vs p95 · Giảm cold start · Audit invocations/ngày

serviceBullets.Logging: retention 7 ngày · filter DEBUG/INFO · structured logging
serviceBullets.Firestore / Storage: cleanup unused indexes · cache frequent reads · batch writes · TTL cho data tạm
serviceBullets.Firebase Hosting: Cache-Control headers · gzip/brotli · review rewrites → fn calls
serviceBullets.Artifact Registry: cleanup policy · giữ N versions gần nhất
serviceBullets.Cloud Run: check min-instances · tăng concurrency · review timeout + CPU throttle
serviceBullets.BigQuery: partition + cluster bảng · query chỉ cột cần · cache kết quả
serviceBullets.Pub/Sub: batch messages · giảm payload · dedup bằng idempotency key
